subcodes.first_line: Man must at all times search out his own shortcomings, that he may turn in repentance to the Threshold of Oneness and remain preserved and protected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان بايد همواره جستجوی قصور خويش نمايد تا آنکه بدرگاه احديّت توبه نمايد و محفوظ و مصون
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge of self, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant
